    BootstrapController
    Watches maxwell.bootstrap, starts and stops bootstrap tasks
    BootstrapTask
    The BootstrapTask class represents a task for bootstrapping a database table and provides methods for creating, manipulating, and matching tasks.
    BqToBqStorageSchemaConverter
    Converts structure from BigQuery client to BigQueryStorage client
    BufferedMaxwell
    A subclass of Maxwell that buffers rows in-memory for consumption by the caller
    BufferedProducer
     
    C3P0ConnectionPool
     
    CaseSensitivity
    Describes the 3 difference case sensitivity settings on a Mysql server.
    ColumnDef
    This class is immutable, all subclasses must be immutable and implement equals and hashCode and call this class's respective methods if the subclass has any member variables.
    ColumnDefCastException

    Logging
     
    Maxwell
    The main Maxwell class.
    MaxwellBigQueryProducer
     
    MaxwellBootstrapUtility
    MaxwellBootstrapUtility is a command line utility that launches and monitors the progress of bootstrapping.
    MaxwellBootstrapUtilityConfig
     
    MaxwellCompatibilityError
    Thrown when Maxwell can't operate with the mysql server configured as it is.
    MaxwellConfig
    Configuration object for Maxwell
    MaxwellConfigServlet
    An HTTP servlet which allows for the live reconfiguration of maxwell.
    MaxwellContext
    Class containing runtime state
    MaxwellDiagnostic
     
    MaxwellDiagnosticContext
     
    MaxwellDiagnosticContext.Config
     
    MaxwellDiagnosticResult
     
    MaxwellDiagnosticResult.Check

    Configuration object describing a mysql connection

    Class with some utility functions for querying mysql server state

    MurmurHash3
    The MurmurHash3 algorithm was created by Austin Appleby and placed in the public domain.
    MurmurHash3.LongPair
     
    mysqlBaseListener
    This class provides an empty implementation of mysqlListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
    mysqlLexer
     
    mysqlListener
    This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by mysqlParser.

    ReadOnlyMysqlPositionStore
    a schema position object that doesn't write its position out.
    Recovery
     
    RecoveryFilter
    filter out (via a blacklist) everything except for `maxwell`.`positions`.
    RecoveryInfo
     
    RecoverySchemaStore
    A schema store that contains only the maxwell database, and throws away any schema changes we encounter while trying to recover the binlog position.
